title.en: Large Screw Compressor Seizure: Not "Oil Starvation", but "Deadly Stacking of Tolerance & Thermal Deformation"
title.zh: 大型螺杆机抱死真相：不是"缺油"，是"公差与热变形的死亡叠加"

excerpt.en:
Misconception: Normal oil level (60%+) ≠ effective lubrication. Simply replacing bearings cannot solve "critical friction".

Truth: Deep disassembly revealed that a certain series of heavy-duty models under maximum tolerance combination, the male rotor engages the female rotor by approximately 35μm. Combined with asymmetric oil supply at the suction end and thermal deformation, the sealing line collapses without an oil film.

Conclusion: True repair must address both "reconstructing the tolerance chain from the manufacturing side" and "adding critical protection on the operational side".
excerpt.zh:
误区：油位正常 (60%+) ≠ 有效润滑。单纯换轴承无法解决"临界摩擦"。

真相：深度拆解发现，某系列重载机型在最大公差组合下，阳转子咬合阴转子约 35μm。叠加吸气端供油不对称与热变形，导致密封线在无油膜状态下崩塌。

结论：真正的修复必须从"制造侧重构公差链"与"运行侧增加临界保护"双向入手。
